titles.title: I See a Cloud Like a Man's Hand

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I see a cloud like a man's hand I see a cloud like a man's hand I see a cloud like a man's hand And I know it's going to rain

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In a time when it was dry not a cloud up in the sky The children of God began to reason why So they went to God's man cause they didn't understand He said go look it's written in the sky

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So they opened up the door Seventh time and looked once more A tiny cloud was rising from the sea And they began to understand The time for rain was at hand Just like God said it would be

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now the bride is looking above For a Charity rain of Love To fill their hearts with peace they've never known And soon this Bride shall be God's unfolded mystery The promised word has been already sown

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So today we have no fear We know a cloud did appear The prophet screamed my bride go through the door A new spirit you'll receive, have faith and just believe The rain is truly gonna pour
